fact: Jayco was founded in 2016 with a laptop, a phone, and a belief: that the right relationships are more valuable than the biggest databases.

Across the North East, Jayco Recruitment provides in excess of 5,000 Health and Social Care staffing hours weekly. (Source: https://www.jaycorec.co.uk/sectors/health-and-social — live sector page, confirmed by web crawl as of June 2026.)

Even after the candidate is placed our service doesn't stop, we offer a 12 week after-care package, after one week we touch base with both the client and candidates to iron out any differences/issues there may be. The page also notes: 'We continue to check in with both sides over the course of the next 3 months to ensure the relationship is the perfect match.'

All of our office-based team have at some time in their careers had exposure to a care or nursing led environment. We are an established team that have a combined experience in care and recruitment of some 34 years — sourced directly from https://www.jaycorec.co.uk/sectors/health-and-social (live page, confirmed June 2026).
Our consultants come from the industries they recruit for — from healthcare and hospitality to logistics and executive placements. That insight means we truly understand what you're looking for.
